description: MemIfNumberOfDevices为1或2时，需要检查NvM/NvMBlockDescriptor/NvMTargetBlockReference，如果存在NvMEaRef和NvMFeeRef两种都不存在时报错
message: NvMTargetBlockReference not match lower modle. MemIfNumberOfDevices is ({0}), but have no NvMTargetBlockReference types.

description: MemIfNumberOfDevices为1时，需要检查NvM/NvMBlockDescriptor/NvMTargetBlockReference，如果存在NvMEaRef和NvMFeeRef两种时报错
message: NvMTargetBlockReference not match lower modle. MemIfNumberOfDevices is ({0}), but have two NvMTargetBlockReference types.
